### Downloads by Country (all time)

| Country | Downloads |
|---------|----------|
| US | 310 |
| HK | 93 |
| CN | 74 |
| FR | 61 |
| SG | 48 |
| DE | 46 |
| PE | 22 |
| IT | 20 |
| CH | 12 |
| MX | 10 |
| ZA | 9 |
| GB | 7 |
| NL | 7 |
| CA | 6 |
| ES | 6 |

---
**Active Use** = pip installs on Windows + macOS (people using the package locally on their machines). **Colab/Linux** = Linux pip installs (mostly Colab notebooks re-installing each session). **Other** = downloads where OS is unknown (mirrors, bots, dependency resolvers). **Countries** = unique countries downloading (via BigQuery, excl. mirrors). **Clones** = unique users pulling the repo.
